name: Oysters and Caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread seaweed in a flat basket.
2. Arrange chilled oysters in their shells, on the seaweed.
3. Thinly slice scallions into rings and sprinkle 2 or 3 pieces on each oyster.
4. Top each oyster with a dab of caviar.
5. Serve very cold, accompanied by fresh, thin sliced lemon wedges.
6. Pass well chilled Champagne.
